docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-12-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-12-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-12-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HAD WAIVED SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. AT THE TIME OF THE HEARING IN DEPT. 220; PLAINTIFF PRESENTED THE ORIGINAL PROOF OF SERVICE TO BE COURT WHICH WAS FILED BY CLERK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IMPERIAL, ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LOPEZ, ADAM $200.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $275.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
